title: Krieg Unleashes Poison Gas
scene: On pages 14–17, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Luffy finally shatters Krieg’s pride and ends the battle at the Baratie.

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: Krieg lost...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As if that could ever happen...

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: He's the supreme ruler of the seas...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Say all you want but take a look for yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: His prized armour is in pieces!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's... the only man... I ever admired...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I believed... He was the strongest...!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: H-Hey you! Don't move or the poison will...

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: What was it again? Does it spread if you move?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: How'd I know!? But in any case moving your body right now can't be a good thing!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: You need to lie down and rest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Gasp!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't you die on me now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All of them...

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: If I were to take even one step back right now,

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: I get the feeling that I'd never be able to return back to where I'm standing right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: this ain't the place for me to die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's simple! Just throw your ambitions away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aren't I strongest!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No one dares to go against me!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Don! Please stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If you keep yelling with those injuries...

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: I've won every single battle I've been in! It's utterly impossible for there to be someone that can match my strength!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Krig!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: I win... and w... ill dont!... nue...

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: Calm down the Don! He's lost his consciousness!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: to win! I

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: I am the Stron-gest!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Don Krieg...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've lost.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: battle comm- ander!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let's retreat for today,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And start knew.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Shanks for everything, Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Please don't come again.

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
